title: athlete — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by AthleteServiceProvider::boot(). All rules are used both by the observer chain (for authoritative refusal on write) AND by FormRequest data classes (for early request-time validation with clear error surfaces). The medical + emergency-contact permission checks live in policies + observers, not in rules — rules validate shape, not authorization.

rules.name: valid_hex_color
rules.description: Standard hex color validator. Foundation-owned; not directly consumed by Athlete but reserved for future customisation fields.

rules.name: valid_e164_phone
rules.description: E.164 phone number. Used on Athlete.emergency_contact_phone.

rules.name: valid_bcp47_locale
rules.description: BCP-47 language tag. Used on Athlete.primary_language.

rules.name: valid_iso4217_currency
rules.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Foundation-owned; reserved for future Finance integration.

rules.name: valid_positive_int
rules.description: Non-negative integer. Used on Athlete.height_cm + weight_kg.

rules.name: valid_dob
rules.description: Validates Athlete.date_of_birth. Refuses: dates in the future, dates more than 100 years in the past (nonsense old-age), dates that would place the athlete at age < 3 (nonsense young-age — platform bounds).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid date of birth (between 3 and 100 years old).

rules.name: valid_athlete_status_transition
rules.description: Enforces the state-machine transitions from the schema x-invariants. Valid transitions: active ↔ paused; active → graduated (terminal); active → withdrawn (terminal, requires withdrawal_reason); {active, paused, graduated, withdrawn} → archived; archived → active (restore only within retention window). Refuses any invalid transition (e.g. graduated → withdrawn, archived → paused directly).
rules.default_message: The :attribute transition from :from to :to is not allowed.

rules.name: consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian
rules.description: For minors (age_years < config.athlete.minor_min_age), when any consent_* is true, refuses when consent_recorded_by_user_id is not a User with an active AthleteGuardian row on this athlete + has_legal_custody=true. Wave 3a: SOFT-WARN (rule fires as a warning; write proceeds). Wave 3b: HARD-FAIL (rule refuses the write) once AthleteGuardian module lands + the cross-module lookup is wired.
rules.default_message: For minor athletes, consent must be recorded by an authorised legal guardian.
rules.wave_note: Wave 3a soft-warn until the AthleteGuardian sibling module lands + the cross-module guardian check is enabled by config('athlete.consent.enforce_guardian_authorisation').

rules.name: medical_notes_within_length
rules.description: Enforces the 8192-char cap on each medical_* text field. Prevents pathological writes that would balloon the athlete_medical_history audit rows.

rules.name: one_active_athlete_per_user_tenant
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, user_id, deleted_at IS NULL) where user_id IS NOT NULL. One active Athlete row per (tenant, user). Duplicate signups must archive first.
rules.default_message: This user already has an active athlete record in this tenant.

rules.name: athlete_age_within_platform_bounds
rules.description: Computes age_years from date_of_birth + today; refuses when age_years < 3 OR age_years > 100. Platform floor + ceiling — matches AgeGroup platform bounds so every athlete has at least one potential age-group match.
rules.default_message: Athlete age must be between 3 and 100 years.
